Compactness in metric spaces

We will formalize the following result. A subset is compact when every open cover has a finite subcover .

The converse direction is currently being checked .

compactness_criterion

theorem · main.tex

Lea project

∑Compactness

Lea.Compactness

3 items · 1 run active

A metric space is compact exactly when it is complete and totally bounded.

theorem compactness_criterion :
  IsCompact s ↔ CompleteSpace s ∧ TotallyBounded s := by
  exact compact_iff_complete_totallyBounded
